name: The Pepsi Bottling Group, Inc.
description: The Pepsi Bottling Group, Inc. (PBG) was a major American beverage manufacturing and distribution company, established as an independent entity in 1999 following a spin-off from PepsiCo. As the world's largest manufacturer, seller, and distributor of Pepsi-Cola beverages, the company operated extensively across North America and parts of Europe. PBG managed a vast network of bottling plants and distribution centers to supply retail outlets with a wide range of carbonated and non-carbonated drinks. In 2010, the company was acquired by PepsiCo and subsequently integrated back into its parent organization's operations.
